ksa_text: Ability to align strategy, business objectives, and technology capabilities, integrating strategic vision, business priorities, and technical capabilities into a unified organizational direction.

dcwf.top_element_label: Engage and collaborate with allies and partners to advance shared strategic AI objectives.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Engage and collaborate with allies and partners to advance shared strategic AI objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-A-002 (LS, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4553 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (onet=0.455, ddat=0.454, nist_ai_rmf=0.440) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4553 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-A-002 (composite 0.4553) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4553 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4553 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4553, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
